config.training_policy: Fit on first 70% of train session, select on last 30% validation block, evaluate on full held-out session.
config.feature_policy: Causal anchor-time features only; future reference fields are labels/quality diagnostics and are excluded from model inputs.

gpu.reason: GPU was detected by shell precheck, but training stayed on CPU because this no-dependency Node.js experiment has no CUDA ML runtime.

python.status: plain python was not found on PATH
python.uv_status: uv could not find a local interpreter with downloads disabled
python.pytorch_status: PyTorch/CUDA was not checked because no local Python interpreter was available

phase3.summary: Deterministic variants did not materially beat the current baseline under the visible-regression guard.

phase4.summary: guarded learned teacher p99 delta -0.422 px; >1/>3/>5 worse 3,353/1,392/0.

phase5.summary: strict distilled candidate p99 delta -0.027 px, mean delta 0.081 px, zero >1/>3/>5 regressions.

phase6.summary: Runtime proxy was acceptable; confidence/accuracy remained the blocker.

recommendation.rule: A deep teacher must improve average held-out cross-session p99 and have zero total >5 px regressions to be product-relevant; broad >1/>3 px regressions decide whether it is only a teacher.
